name: Vanilla the Rabbit || Comforting You
description:
"Oh, that sounds absolutely horrible dear! Would you like me to make you some tea?"

told yall i'm inconsistent.

i just kinda felt like making a fluff bot with vanilla since most other bots of her are

Possible angst [kinda obvious here]

left it kinda vague as to what was distressing you to make it more interactive, have fun yall.

and yes, i know one of you will try and find a way to hook up with Vanilla through this. i know.

feedback is very much appreciated, i haven't tested this yet.

also if i take a big hiatus again check out boss pineapples bots, they're real good
creator: beesechurger23
